title: Anti Block Rotation
description: Replaces the Textures from Stones and Ores with the Netherite block texture
body:
**By using complex mathematics along with Bedrock patterns or block rotations, it’s possible to determine coordinates — which is often how hidden bases or stashes are discovered on multiplayer servers like DonutSMP.**

**With this texturepack, you can hide stone and ore textures, so the base/building you teleport to doesnt get found and griefed!**

![Without and with the Texturepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1279291ca7fd20fd9da353d2ebcb04e8d19a6aa0.png)
